ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "contact_first_name" TEXT /* First name of the primary contact */,
  "contact_last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the primary contact */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the client */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the client is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the client is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the client */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the client */,
  "vat_number" TEXT /* VAT number of the client */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency used by the client */,
  "client_group" TEXT /* Groups that the client belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the client belongs to */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company */,
  "annual_revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the client */,
  "client_since" TEXT /* Date when the client first engaged with the company */,
  "preferred_communication_channel" TEXT /* Preferred method of communication */,
  "last_contact_date" TEXT /* Date of the last interaction with the client */,
  "lead_source" TEXT /* Source from which the client was acquired */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the client relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clients_client_group FOREIGN KEY ("client_group") REFERENCES client_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clients_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency (e.g., USD, AED) */,
  "currency_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency (e.g., $, AE) */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate of the currency relative to a base currency */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the exchange rate was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "group_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the group */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the group was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the group */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_groups_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_groups_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., call, email, meeting) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the interaction */,
  "interaction_channel" TEXT /* Channel of interaction (e.g., phone, email, in-person) */,
  "initiated_by" TEXT /* Who initiated the interaction (e.g., client, company) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in minutes */,
  "follow_up_required" TEXT /* Indicates if a follow-up is required (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date by which a follow-up should be completed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who recorded the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client associated with the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the project ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "project_manager" INTEGER /* Project manager assigned to the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "profit_margin" REAL /* Profit margin of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the project */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency of the product's price */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., services, goods) */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Available stock quantity of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for inventory management */,
  "last_sold_date" TEXT /* Date the product was last sold */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the product */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the invoice is issued to */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date when the invoice was issued */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency of the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the invoice (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date by which the invoice should be paid */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the invoice amount */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applied to the invoice amount */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount including tax and discount */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the invoice */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the invoice was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the invoice */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the invoice was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice that the payment is for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount that was paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "reference_number" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, failed, pending) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who recorded the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was recorded */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the payment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for accessing the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the account was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the account */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
